items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks when to renew licence; options match q0420 (90 days). Local option C = 90 jours aligns with master correct answer.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows a level crossing; statement 'must stop and observe' is true. q0330 (Right) matches. French source 'A Yes' corresponds to Right.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Source statement ('push up turns on left indicator') is false. q0553 prompt matches this wording and its stored answer is Wrong. French source 'B No' corresponds to Wrong. Rejected top matcher: Top machine match q0529 has a different prompt (pull down → right), so we selected q0553 (rank 2) which exactly matches the 'move upward → left-turn' formulation.

Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Blue sign shows arrows straight + left (lane allowing straight or left turn). No existing candidate QID clearly encodes 'go straight and turn left' exactly, so create new question; correct local option = A.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows car at crosswalk where stopping/parking is prohibited. q0270 prompt 'can not stop here' matches; French 'A Yes' = Right.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Statement 'accelerate to cross before red' is unsafe/false. q0231 explicitly covers 'speeding up to go through before light turns red' → Wrong. French 'B No' corresponds to Wrong. Rejected top matcher: Top machine match q0638 is about left-turn permission and is not the best match; q0231 more closely matches the exact speed-up-before-red wording.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Green highway sign with P and cup indicates service/rest area ahead. q0884 correct meaning = 'highway service area ahead'; local option C matches.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Image lacks a clearly illuminated traffic signal; prompt/choices ambiguous. Candidate matches are low-confidence and inconsistent; unable to determine definitive correct localized option.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Question on penalty for drunk driving; master q0507 indicates 'detention and a fine' as the punishment. Local option B ('détention et amende') matches that meaning.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Yellow triangular warning with '!' is generic 'attention/danger'. q0767 maps to 'watch for danger'. Local option C ('attention danger') best matches that meaning.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Source blue mandatory sign means go straight and turn left; no existing qid safely matches that exact sign/option row. Keep source image and create new with local answer C.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Source ROW asks if only turning on the blinker and quickly entering the lane is acceptable — this matches q0097 ('driver only needs to turn on the turn signal before rapidly entering the new lane') which is False/Wrong. French 'B No' corresponds to Wrong. Rejected top matcher: Machine top suggestion was q0073; q0097 more closely matches the specific phrasing about 'only turn on the signal then rapidly enter'.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows foggy conditions; among options 'les feux de brouillard' (B) is the recommended choice here. q0453 (use fog lights) matches the intended meaning. Rejected top matcher: Top machine match (q0497) emphasised 'do not use high beam' vs q0453 explicitly 'use fog lights' which aligns with the source options.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt asks appropriate response to non-motorized vehicle cutting in; 'ralentir et laisser passer' (C) matches q0105 ('reduce speed and yield').
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Text asks what to do if oncoming vehicle must use our lane; 'lui céder le passage par politesse' (D) matches q0135 ('yield to the other side as much as possible').

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Diagram shows white semicircle/polylines used to indicate confirming distance between vehicles; q0722's meaning ('ascertaining the distance between the vehicles') corresponds to source option C. Rejected top matcher: Top machine match (q0598) was unrelated (dashboard light); q0722 is a closer semantic match for the road marking meaning.
Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Source ROW wording matches q0058 about not yielding to a non-motorized user cutting in after green light. q0058 is false; local answer B (No).

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Blue circular sign with a white arrow pointing down-right could mean 'keep right' or 'turn right' depending on local sign convention; source options include both interpretations (B vs D). Visual semantics ambiguous, so unresolved. Rejected top matcher: Machine top candidate (q0868) interprets as 'turn right' but visual/layout and option set allow multiple legitimate readings.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Question asks which response is incorrect when a vehicle breaks down on the highway; 'interdire les passagers de monter ou de descendre' (C) is incorrect and matches q0389 ('passengers cannot get off'). Rejected top matcher: Top machine match was q0381 (focused on correct actions), but q0389 specifically asks which is incorrect and aligns with the source.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks which lane to choose for left turn; q0408 is an exact image/prompt/option match with correct far-left lane. Local answer A.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Blue directional sign with intersection diagram and '500m' indicates a location/distance sign. q0758's meaning 'location and distance' matches the French option A. Top machine match (q0771) is more generic; q0758 is a closer semantic match. Rejected top matcher: Top machine match q0771 denotes a general 'directional sign' but q0758 specifically encodes 'location and distance' which matches the source wording.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Image shows a left stalk; machine top q0618 indicates a combined 'headlights and turn signals' control (master correct D), but none of the source options explicitly say 'headlights and turn signals'. Source option A ('headlight switch') is narrower. Insufficient confidence to map master answer to a source letter.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Text asks what to do if a vehicle breaks down and cannot be moved. q0381's correct action is 'turn on hazard lights', matching French option A.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement about avoiding stopping and driving carefully through landslide-prone mountain sections is true. q0007 (Right/True) matches; French 'Yes' = A.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Red seatbelt dashboard indicator; q0605 indicates 'driver has not fastened their seatbelt', matching French option A.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows light control stalk; top candidate q0525 states 'front fog lights are turned on' for this position. French 'Yes' = A matches that meaning.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Scene matches q0850. The master correct meaning is 'cannot run in the lane of either side' (i.e., driving in lanes on each side is prohibited) which corresponds to the French option A ('il est interdit...').

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Question about green light at congested intersection — standard rule is do not enter intersection. q0155's correct is 'cannot enter the intersection' matching French option B.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Red warning light with exclamation mark could indicate brake system, handbrake, or other warnings. Machine candidates conflict (seatbelt, handbrake, oil pressure). Although the source asserts the statement is false, there is not a single clear existing qid to map to the French options with high confidence.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Yellow triangular warning sign with symbol for uneven/dip road. q0782's meaning 'speed bump / uneven road' aligns with French option A ('ralentisseur de type dos-d'ane').
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Text-only item matches existing ROW q0042 (reduce speed when bus feels shaking to avoid tire blowout). Source Yes = True aligns with q0042.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows police car with lights behind a red car; q0378 (yield) matches meaning. French option B = 'céder le passage' matches candidate correct.
Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Top candidate q0745 indicates 'gradual road width' for the yellow marking; French option B corresponds to 'largeur de route augmente graduellement'.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Question about how long to apply after info change matches q0447 (30 days). French option D = 30 days. Rejected top matcher: Machine top match (q0142) concerned highway acceleration speed; q0447 (30 days) better matches the license-renewal prompt.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: The yellow hashed/filled center marking corresponds to q0873 'opposite direction dividing line that cannot be crossed' — French option C matches that meaning.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Source states a person prosecuted for criminal liability after causing a serious drunk-driving accident cannot apply for a license; q0204 expresses this; French Yes = A. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate (q0223) referenced fleeing the scene; q0204 specifically covers drunk-driving criminal liability matching source wording.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows yellow grid in intersection center; q0804 identifies this as a cross-hatched marking. French option C = 'quadrillage jaune' matches.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Blue sign with upward arrow denotes straight/one-way straight; q0818 ('straight one-way road') matches. French option C corresponds.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Green highway sign with an arrow to the right indicates a right-side highway exit. q0883 corresponds to 'highway right exit ahead' — French option B = 'sortie droite'.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Legal nuance unclear: candidates disagree whether police may order drivers to leave/evacuate after property-damage collisions. Insufficient evidence to map to an existing qid or to choose True/False. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate (q0250) asserts police cannot order leave; conflicting candidates and legal nuance make automatic acceptance unsafe.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source ROW statement matches q0214 ('preserve the scene and report to police' after injury-causing accident). French options A=Yes corresponds to correct True answer.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review. Rejected top matcher: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Direct match to q0457 (distance to switch high→low beams). Extracted correct = 'à plus de 150m' which is option B.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Submerged/ flooded road difficulty corresponds to q0146 ('can't see hidden holes/bumps'). Source option A matches that meaning.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: U-turn safety guidance matches q0075. Correct = Yes (A).

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Statement about police immobilising vehicle using another's plate/forged registration aligns with existing items (q0294/q0335). Source Yes = A. Matching score modest; flag medium risk due to similar candidates.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Matches q0412: when visibility <50m and speed ≤20km/h, driver should leave the highway asap. Source option B corresponds.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement about driving a short distance after taking psychoactive medication aligns with q0282 (false). Correct answer = No (B).

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review. Rejected top matcher: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows blue rectangular sign with camera symbol. q0671 (traffic monitoring equipment) is the visual match. Master correct option maps to French option B ('appareil d'observation de la situation routière'); set answer to B.
